description: Letter from a certain Efrayim concerning consignments of wheat and sums of money, written in a very polite form with many Hebrew phrases, among them biblical citations such as Deuteronomy 26:11. (Information from CUDL) See also Goitein's index card.
description_he: מכתב מאפרים על משלוחי חיטה ותשלומים, מנומס ומלא פסוקים עבריים כולל דברים כ"ו:י"א.
